title: senecio trachylepus
intro: Senecio trachylepus, also known as Jacob's ladder, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, contributing to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving lung function. Senecio trachylepus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs.
